name: decoder
description: 2->4 one-hot decoder (type 18). Walks the selection 0->3->1->2->0, moving the active output across all four pins. The 0->3 and 1->2 steps flip BOTH address bits in one tick, so the decoder is enqueued and computed twice that tick — exercising the sel-latch idempotency guard (§5.3a) against the C++ double-compute oracle.
